title: Cucurbitaceae: Refreshed
description: Revitalized gourd blocks, stems with growth stage progression and rare flowering variants.
body:
# Cucurbitceae: Refreshed
*Enhances melons and pumpkins with detailed textures and growth stages for more visually appealing crop farming.*

## Features
  - Completely refreshed melon block texture
  - Brand new pumpkin, carved pumpkin, and jack o'lantern textures
  - Dedicated bottom textures for all the aforementioned blocks
  - Unique textures for each growth stage of melon and pumpkin stems
  - Special flowering stem variant with 5% appearance chance when attached

## Installation
1. Download the resource pack
2. Place the .zip file directly in your resource packs folder
3. Activate in-game and enjoy!

## Credits
- [Stormilla](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stormilla) by: [StormDragon77](https://modrinth.com/user/StormDragon77)
